Charger.description: Charger infomation for the BMS to broadcast to other boards

CellVoltageStats.description: Min/max cell voltage with segment + cell index

CellTempStats.description: Min/max cell temperature with segment + thermistor index

SegmentVoltageStats.description: Min/max segment voltage with segment index

CellOpenWireCheck.description: Cell oper wire check for all segments

CellDischargeEnabled.description: Cell discharge (balancing) enabled flags for all segments

CellPwmDuty_Seg0_Seg3.description: Cell balancing PWM duty (0-15) for segments 0-3

CellPwmDuty_Seg4_Seg7.description: Cell balancing PWM duty (0-15) for segments 4-7

CellPwmDuty_Seg8_Seg9.description: Cell balancing PWM duty (0-15) for segments 8-9

ThermistorOpenWireCheck.description: Thermistor open wire check for all segments

SegmentVD.description: Digital supply voltage (2.7V to 3.6V) for all segments

SegmentVA.description: Analog supply voltage (4.5V to 5.5V) for all segments

SegmentVRES.description: VRES (VREF2 with series resistor for OWC) for all segments

SegmentVA_OV.description: Analog supply OV flags for all segments

SegmentVA_UV.description: Analog supply UV flags for all segments

SegmentVD_OV.description: Digital supply OV flags for all segments

SegmentVD_UV.description: Digital supply UV flags for all segments

SegmentCED.description: Cell error detection flags for all segments

SegmentCMED.description: Cell mux error detection flags for all segments

SegmentSED.description: Supply error detection flags for all segments

SegmentSMED.description: Supply mux error detection flags for all segments

SegmentVDE.description: VD error flags for all segments

SegmentVDEL.description: VD error latched flags for all segments

SegmentTHSD.description: Thermal shutdown flags for all segments

SegmentTMODCHK.description: Thermal model check flags for all segments

SegmentOSCCHK.description: Oscillator check flags for all segments

SegmentCMDCNT.description: ADBMS command counter mismatch flags for all segments

CellVoltageErrors_Seg0_Seg3.description: Per-cell error codes for cell voltages: Segment 0-3 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellVoltageErrors_Seg4_Seg7.description: Per-cell error codes for cell voltages: Segment 4-7 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellVoltageErrors_Seg8_Seg9.description: Per-cell error codes for cell voltages: Segment 8-9 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellTempErrors_Seg0_Seg3.description: Per-thermistor error codes for cell temps: Segment 0-3 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellTempErrors_Seg4_Seg7.description: Per-thermistor error codes for cell temps: Segment 4-7 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellTempErrors_Seg8_Seg9.description: Per-thermistor error codes for cell temps: Segment 8-9 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellOpenWireCheckErrors_Seg0_Seg3.description: Per-cell error codes for OWC: Segment 0-3 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellOpenWireCheckErrors_Seg4_Seg7.description: Per-cell error codes for OWC: Segment 4-7 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

CellOpenWireCheckErrors_Seg8_Seg9.description: Per-cell error codes for OWC: Segment 8-9 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

ThermistorOpenWireCheckErrors_Seg0_Seg3.description: Per-thermistor error codes for thermistor OWC: Segment 0-3 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

ThermistorOpenWireCheckErrors_Seg4_Seg7.description: Per-thermistor error codes for thermistor OWC: Segment 4-7 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

ThermistorOpenWireCheckErrors_Seg8_Seg9.description: Per-thermistor error codes for thermistor OWC: Segment 8-9 (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

SegmentVoltageErrors.description: Per-segment error codes for segment voltages (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

SegmentStatAErrors.description: Per-segment error codes for STATA (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

SegmentStatBErrors.description: Per-segment error codes for STATB (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

SegmentStatCErrors.description: Per-segment error codes for STATC (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

SegmentStatDErrors.description: Per-segment error codes for STATD (INVALID_ARGS = no error)

SegmentHealthErrors.description: Per-segment health error bits (9 bits per segment, 10 segments). True = error set.

ElconControls.description: Control parameters for Elcon charger communication
